title: Teltonika RUT906 4G LTE RS232/RS485 Router
description: RUT956 is a robust and durable industrial 4G / LTE Dual SIM router with Wi-Fi and Ethernet support. Quick deployment, easy management, and flexibility for applications across the most demanding market sectors The router is equipped with four ethernet ports , two SIM slots , RS232/RS485, digital I/O, and LED signal strength indicators. Support for GNSS system is also included. SMA connectors for connecting external antennas allow for better received signal strength Advanced RutOS operating system, a universal operating system for Teltonika routers designed for the most demanding network applications. Device management is possible via the cloud service RMS - Remote Management System Device Power adapter (2) LTE antennas (SMA-male) (2) Wi-Fi antennas (RSMA-male) GNSS antenna (SMA-male) RS485 connector block I/O connector block SIM adapter kit Patch cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Detachable Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (2) 1900 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (38) 2600 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps RF connectors (2) RSMA female, (3) SMA female LAN speed (3) 10/100Mbps Serial port RS-232, RS-485 SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 USB Yes GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet 9 .. 30V DC Power type PoE, DC connector Max. power consumption [W] 7 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Design Industry Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 295 Width [mm] 110 Height [mm] 50 Depth [mm] 100 Hardware CPU frequency [MHz] 580 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 128
